title: Villager Clock Tower
description: Adds a Villager Clock Tower with unique rooms and a challenging parkour passage
body:
### Villager Clock Tower:

This mod adds a Clock Tower to the plains and forest biomes, home to villagers who live and work there.

![Overview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cd0a35ad915d9f693004e69bfd9b89317788c1c4.jpeg)


There are various themed rooms, each featuring different villager professions.

![Inside](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/60ded64cc61e2f9705ce40e38d50758f90ccee4a.jpeg)

![Inside](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1cc84ce99c9ac74a04b64d786f5750bf5780cf2a.jpeg)

Within the tower’s clockwork mechanism lies a challenging parkour passage – complete it to earn a small reward waiting at the top of the tower!

![Jump and Run](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d562d9f1d448c4a1f871a5aeba9b1e3d8e85e107.jpeg)



Feel free to use this mod in your modpacks!
